title: HeadingWidgetConfig
description: Config for sandbox.heading — a single atlas-heading at the chosen level.

x-atlas-presets.label: H1 page title
x-atlas-presets.description: Top-level page heading. Use once per page.

x-atlas-presets.label: H2 section
x-atlas-presets.description: Major section heading inside a page.

x-atlas-presets.label: H3 subsection
x-atlas-presets.description: Subsection heading nested under an H2.

level.title: Level
level.description: Semantic heading level (1 through 6). Drives both the rendered tag and visual size.
